description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a slightly concave profile and rounded nose and tail. The top of the deck is covered in solid black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the thin yellowish edge. Underneath, the skateboard is equipped with two black trucks and four black wheels, all of which are standard in size and shape for street skating. The trucks are mounted in a traditional configuration, and the wheels are classic street type, suitable for urban environments. There are no visible graphics, logos, or additional design elements on the deck or wheels, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip-taped deck, yellowish wood edges, and black trucks and wheels. The design is simple and functional, with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, yellowish wood edge, and both black wheels and trucks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, black grip tape, and two black wheels visible beneath the deck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the deck's length, wood edge, and both wheels and trucks.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded tail, black grip tape, and two black wheels beneath the deck.
attribute_wheel_type: street, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, black, traditional mounting, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern or graphics
